# x-twitter-scraper_style (Data Source)

Tweet composition, drafts, writing styles & radar



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `fetched_at` (String)
- `is_own_account` (Boolean)
- `tweet_count` (Number)
- `tweets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tweets))
